name: AARAKOCRA
statblock: AC 13 (natural), HP 9, ATK 2 bite/talon +2 (1d6), spear +3 (1d6), MV near (fly), S +2, D +2, C +0, I +0, W +0, Ch +0, AL C, LV 2
description: Gaunt, lightly feathered, winged humanoid with vulture-like beak and face. Long black talons on both hands and feet.

abilities.name: Carrion Feeder
abilities.description: Consume a fifth of a helpless, unconscious, or dead humanoid within close distance. Regain 1d6 HP.

abilities.name: Carrion Tracker
abilities.description: Can track dead flesh unerringly within a mile.

abilities.name: Dive
abilities.description: Descend up to double near distance downward in straight line and make a talon attack. If hit, deals 3x damage.

name: ANT, GIANT
biome: forest, cave, grassland, mountain, underground, ruins, jungle, desert
statblock: AC 13 (dense chitin), HP 13, ATK 1 bite +4 (1d6 + grab), MV near, S +3, D +0, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 3
description: Cattle-sized giant ant with ferocious snapping mandibles and long thin legs.

abilities.name: Chitinous
abilities.description: Half damage from bludgeoning.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.description: Victim must make STR check vs DC 12 or be held. DC 12 STR on turn to break free.

abilities.name: Dismember
abilities.description: If an ally has grabbed a humanoid, can attack it with advantage. If successful, deals additional 2d6 damage.

name: ARCHON
statblock: AC 17 (plate mail + shield), HP 27, ATK 1 longsword +3 (1d8) or 1 spell +4, MV near, S +3, D +3, C +4, I +1, W +2, Ch +3, AL L, LV 5
description: Luminous humanoid covered in brilliant white plate armor, carrying a shield and longsword.

abilities.name: Holy Flame (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Self. Weapons ignite in magic flames and deal an additional 1d6 damage for 5 rounds.

abilities.name: Holy Word (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Near. A chaotic opponent takes 3d6 damage.

abilities.name: Ward Against Evil
abilities.description: Chaotic beings have disadvantage on attack rolls and hostile spellcasting checks against an Archon. These beings also can't possess, compel, or beguile it.

name: ARMITAGE
attack: 1 punch +1 (1d4) or throw flaming oil +2 (1d4, near)
statblock: AC 11, HP 9, ATK 1 punch +1 (1d4) or throw flaming oil +2 (1d4, near), MV near, S +1, D +1, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 2
description: A short ugly fae creature you mistook for a child at first. Its arms are unusually long and holding a bottle of oil.

abilities.name: Misty Step
abilities.description: In a puff of smoke, teleports a near distance.

abilities.name: Stealthy
abilities.description: Advantage on checks to sneak, hide, or stalk a target.

abilities.name: Sticky Fingers
abilities.description: Able to use telekinesis to snatch one flask of lantern oil from a near PC every round (in addition to normal attacks).

name: ASSASSIN VINE
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 strangle +2 (1d4 + constrict), MV close, S +2, D +2, C +0, I -2, W -2, Ch -3, AL N, LV 1
description: A ten-foot-long fibrous vine with large, thick leaves that resemble human hands.

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.description: Contested STR to hold target immobile for one round.

abilities.name: Strangle
abilities.description: Deals double damage against surprised creatures.

name: BANSHEE
attack: 2 draining touch +1 (1d6), 1 drink pain, or 1 screech
statblock: AC 12, HP 22, ATK 2 draining touch +1 (1d6), 1 drink pain, or 1 screech, MV near (fly), S +0, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 5
description: A ghostly semi-nude woman with a face of vicious hatred. Her relentless, piercing screams seem to echo inside your mind.

abilities.name: Drink Pain
abilities.description: CHA vs DC 12. Near. Deals 2d4 damage to a creature; regain that many HP.

abilities.name: Screech
abilities.description: All enemies in double near DC 12 WIS or disadvantage on checks and attacks for 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Greater Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

name: BLOODWORM
statblock: AC 12 (chitin), HP 5, ATK 1 bite +1 (1d4 + attach), MV near, S +1, D +1, C +1, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 1
description: A wiggling, arm-length worm with tough outer chitin and a toothy circular maw.

abilities.name: Attach
abilities.description: Attach to target; bite automatically hits next round. DC 12 STR on turn to tear off.

name: BULLYWUG
statblock: AC 15 (leather + shield), HP 10, ATK 1 spear (close/near) +1 (1d6 + poison), shortbow (far) +2 (1d6 + poison), MV near (walk), double near (swim), S +0, D +2, C +1, I +0, W +1, Ch -1, AL C, LV 2
description: Wiry amphibious humanoids with bulging yellow eyes and glimmering moist skin.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: DC 15 CON or sleep for 1d6 rounds.

abilities.name: Half-Amphibious
abilities.description: Must be submerged in water every 4 hours or suffocates.

name: DEATH BEAST
statblock: AC 12 (natural), HP 9, ATK 1 bite +1 (1d6 + disease), MV near, S +1, D +2, C +0, I -2, W +1, Ch -3, AL C, LV 2
description: A hideously deformed dog-like creature with glowing red eyes and dripping jowls.

abilities.name: Disease
abilities.description: DC 12 CON or 1d4 CON damage (can't heal while ill). Repeat check once per day; ends on success. Die at 0 CON.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: Jump up to double near distance, then make a bite attack with advantage.

name: DEVOURER
statblock: AC 15 (natural), HP 42, ATK 2 claw +1 (2d8), or 1 spell, MV near, S +1, D +1, C +2, I +1, W +3, Ch +1, AL C, LV 9
description: A sickly 8-foot-tall humanoid with pale skin. A grotesque deformed baby is embedded in their stomach. Its eyes glow red.

abilities.name: Cancel (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. End one spell affecting a target within near distance.

abilities.name: Greater Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

abilities.name: Revenant (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 9. Causes a humanoid corpse within near distance to rise up and fight as a zombie.

name: DRAGONNE
statblock: AC 17 (natural), HP 34, ATK 2 bite +6 (1d8), claw +8 (1d6 + grab), terrifying roar, MV double near (walk), near (fly), S +3, D +2, C +2, I +3, W +2, Ch +1, AL C, LV 7
description: Great cat with a lustrous coat that is broken up by patches of leathery scales. Arcing draconic wings jut upward from the back, twitching with tension as it stalks forward.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.description: Victim must make STR check vs DC 15 or be held. DC 15 STR on turn to break free.

abilities.name: Savage
abilities.description: Advantage on attacks against creatures below half their HP.

abilities.name: Stealthy
abilities.description: Advantage on checks to sneak, hide, or stalk a target.

abilities.name: Terrifying Roar
abilities.description: DC 12. Deals 1d4 sonic damage to anyone within near distance. Anyone affected must make a morale check to resist fleeing in fear for 1d4+1 rounds.

name: DRAIN FLY

statblock: AC 13, HP 1, ATK 1 bite +0 (1 + drain magic), MV near, S -1, D +3, C +0, I -3, W -2, Ch -3, AL C, LV 0

abilities.name: Drain Magic
abilities.description: Takes away the ability to cast a random magic spell from the target (recovered by rest). Can immediately cast that spell (without a check) on any nearby target if it would be beneficial to the drain fly.

name: DRAKE
statblock: AC 14 (natural), HP 24, ATK 2 bite +5 (2d6 + devour), claws +6 (2d4), MV near, S +4, D +1, C +2, I +2, W +2, Ch +0, AL C, LV 5
description: A wingless four-legged dragon. Blood and bits of flesh drip from its open jaws.

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.description: If victim is LV 5 or lower, they must make DEX check vs DC 12 or be killed instantly.

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.description: Jump up to near in height and double near in distance, then make 2 bite attacks.

name: DREAD KNIGHT

abilities.name: Impervious

name: FROST MAGGOTS
statblock: AC 11, HP 1, ATK 1 bite +1 (1 + frostbite), MV near, S +1, D +1, C +0, I -2, W -2, Ch -2, AL N, LV 0
description: Plump flying insects roughly the size of a cat or lobster.

abilities.name: Frostbite
abilities.description: Roll 1d6. On a 1-4, the victim develops frostbite around the affected area. The skin turns black and can only be saved by magical healing.

abilities.name: Fire Vulnerability
abilities.description: Double damage from fire.

name: GIBBERLING
statblock: AC 10, HP 3, ATK 1 mace +0 (1d6), MV near, S +0, D +1, C -1, I -2, W -2, Ch -1, AL C, LV 1
description: Hideously deformed humanoid covered in scars and warts. It jabbers constantly in a mix of different languages using words and phrases that seem correct but don't actually make sense.

abilities.name: Gibbering
abilities.description: Creatures within near of a gibberling must make a WIS check vs DC 12 on their turn or take a random action (d8): 1-2 do nothing, 3-4 drop what is in your hands, 5-6 move in random direction, 7 attack nearest creature (even allies), 8 flee.

name: GNOME
biome: forest, hills, cave, rural, underground, deeps
statblock: AC 13 (leather + shield), HP 9, ATK 1 shortsword +1 (1d6), shortbow (far) +1 (1d4), MV near, S +0, D +1, C +0, I +2, W +1, Ch +1, AL C, LV 2
description: Short humanoid with a well-manicured beard and finely crafted leather clothing. Its rosy cheeks are already breaking out into a smirk.

abilities.name: Glamour (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 9. Creates a small motionless visual illusion (no larger than their own body) that remains active for 5 rounds.

abilities.name: Keen Senses
abilities.description: Can't be surprised.

name: HALFLING
statblock: AC 12 (leather), HP 6, ATK 1 shortsword +1 (1d6) or shortbow +2 (1d4, far), MV near, S +0, D +1, C +1, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 1
description: Short humanoid with curly hair and large bare feet, wearing simple clothing and moving with natural grace.

abilities.name: Vanishing
abilities.description: Once per day, becomes invisible for 3 rounds.

name: INSECT SWARM

statblock: AC 9, HP 1, ATK 1 bite +0 (1 + itching), MV near, S -1, D -1, C +0, I -2, W -2, Ch -2, AL N, LV 0
description: Resilient swarm of biting insects that crawls and bursts forward in short flights on tiny wings.

abilities.name: Fearless
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks.

abilities.name: Itching
abilities.description: DC 9 CON or be frantic and take no action on next turn.

name: JACKAL
statblock: AC 11, HP 2, ATK 1 bite +1 (1 + disease), MV near, S +0, D +1, C +1, I -3, W +2, Ch -3, AL N, LV 0
description: Small yellowish-brown canine that bounces around with each step and yips like a fox.

abilities.name: Disease
abilities.description: DC 12 CON or 1d4 CON damage (can't heal while ill). Repeat check once per day; ends on success. Die at 0 CON.

name: LIZARD, GIANT
statblock: AC 14 (natural), HP 25, ATK 2 claws (1d6), bite (1d8 + shake), MV double near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -3, W -3, Ch -1, AL N, LV 5
description: A giant four-legged green lizard with a long spiky tail.

abilities.name: Shake
abilities.description: Violently shake the victim for 1d6 additional damage, then throw them up to near distance.

name: MEPHIT
statblock: AC 11, HP 8, ATK 1 claws +0 (1d4) or 1 elemental breath, MV near (fly), S +0, D +1, C -1, I +1, W +1, Ch +1, AL C, LV 2
description: Devilish humanoid with leathery wings and a swishing tail.

abilities.name: Elemental Breath
abilities.description: Deal 2d6 damage (of any elemental type; fire, lightning, frost, etc.) to a target at close range. CON vs DC 12 reduces the damage by half.

name: MONGRELMEN
statblock: AC 9, HP 4, ATK 1 club +0 (1d4), MV near, S +0, D -1, C -1, I -2, W +0, Ch -1, AL N, LV 1
description: Short, hideous humanoid in tattered clothing. Holding a club. It looks like they have body parts from a variety of creatures.

abilities.name: Terrify
abilities.description: DC 12 CHA for close creatures or disadvantage on attacks 1d4 rounds.

name: NECROMANCER
statblock: AC 12, HP 40, ATK 2 staff +0 (1d6) or 1 spell, MV near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +4, W +2, Ch +1, AL C, LV 9
description: A human in black robes with red tattoos carved into their face.

abilities.name: Revenant (INT spell)
abilities.description: Animates a recently deceased humanoid of LV 3 or less within close range. They serve as a faithful ally in combat until destroyed.

abilities.name: Summon Undead (INT spell)
abilities.description: 2d4 skeletons emerge from the nearest soft ground (soil, sand, pebbles, etc.). They will serve as faithful allies for 5 rounds or until destroyed.

abilities.name: Vampiric Grip (INT spell)
abilities.description: Make this check with advantage. If successful, the target is grabbed firmly and wracked with pain (treat as incapacitated) for a round. They take 2d6 damage and the necromancer gains the same amount of HP.

name: ROT GRUB
biome: cave, deeps, dungeon, tomb, underground, swamp
statblock: AC 8, HP 1, ATK 1 bite +0 (1 + necrosis), MV close (burrowing), S -2, D -2, C +0, I -3, W -3, Ch -3, AL N, LV 0
description: Swollen maggot-like creature the size of a cat. As it inches its way forward, you can hear the clicking sound of its tiny snapping jaws.

abilities.name: Necrosis
abilities.description: DC 15 CON or drop to 0 HP. Healing spells are DC 15 to cast on target while affected by necrosis.

abilities.name: Curse of Undeath
abilities.description: Any humanoid that dies of a rot grub's necrosis will rise in 1d4 days as a zombie (or skeleton, if the corpse is sufficiently damaged).

name: SATYR
statblock: AC 12, HP 22, ATK 1 club +3 (1d4), pipe music, MV near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL C, LV 5
description: Curious creature with a human upper torso and the lower torso of a goat. It also has small goat-like horns atop its head.

abilities.name: Pipe Music
abilities.description: Humanoids within near distance that can hear the music must make a CHA check vs DC 12 or be dazed (cannot take actions) for 1d4 rounds.

name: SNAKE, BONE
statblock: AC 15 (natural), HP 1, ATK 1 bite +1 (1d4 + constrict), MV near, S +2, D +2, C +0, I -2, W -2, Ch -2, AL C, LV 0
description: An animated snake skeleton that whips around violently.

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.description: Attaches to victim and constricts for 1d4 crushing damage per round. DC 15 STR on turn to break free.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks.

name: SNAKE, SHOCK

description: A thin white and red snake with bat-like wings soaring through the air with its fangs out.

abilities.name: System Shock
abilities.description: CON vs DC 15 or electricity burst triggers 1d4 rounds of paralysis.

name: TROGLODYTE
statblock: AC 14 (bits of armor), HP 10, ATK 1 mace +2 (1d6), MV near, S +2, D +2, C +1, I -1, W +2, Ch -1, AL C, LV 2
description: Foul-smelling humanoid with a lizard-like appearance, wearing bits of haphazard armor.

abilities.name: Stench
abilities.description: Close. CON vs DC 12 or be incapacitated that round.

name: VEGEPYGMY
statblock: AC 12 (natural), HP 7, ATK 1 spear +1 (1d8), blowgun (far) +2 (1d4), spore cloud, MV near, S +0, D +1, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +1, AL C, LV 2
description: Squat humanoid that appears to be made of fungus and plant tissue. Its eyes are glazed over murky pools of liquid resin. All of its equipment appears to be made of wood, vines, and reeds.

abilities.name: Spore Cloud
abilities.description: Exudes a cloud of spores from the mouth. Humanoids within near distance that were not already holding their breath must make a CON check vs DC 12 or become infected. In 1d4 days, they will wake up as a vegepygmy.

abilities.name: Stealthy
abilities.description: Advantage on checks to sneak, hide, or stalk a target.

name: WEREBEAR
statblock: AC 18 (natural), HP 44, ATK 2 claws +4 (1d8+2), bite +6 (2d8), MV double near, S +4, D +2, C +3, I +0, W +0, Ch +0, AL C, LV 9

abilities.name: Crush
abilities.description: Deals an extra die of damage if it hits the same target with both claws.

abilities.name: Impervious
abilities.description: Only damaged by silver or magic sources.

abilities.name: Lycanthropy
abilities.description: If 12 or more damage from the same werebear, contract lycanthropy.

abilities.name: Thick Fur
abilities.description: Cold immune.
